title: Breach of the Protection and Accountability Obligations by MCST 4375 and Breach of the Protection Obligation by A Best Security Management
summary: Both MCST 4375 and A Best Security Management failed to put in place reasonable security arrangements to prevent the unauthorised disclosure of CCTV footage of an individual injured by a falling glass door at Alexandra Central Mall. MCST 4375 also failed to put in place policies and practices necessary for the organisation to comply with...
dedupKey: breach of the protection and accountability obligations by mcst 4375 and breach of the protection obligation by a best security management|2020-03-19
